notes: Input plug is NEMA L5-20P (20A twist-lock); output receptacles are NEMA 5-20R (20A) — neither is in the allowed connector enum, so nema-5-15 (the closest 120V power connector in the list) is used for both with notes. Ethernet speed is not explicitly stated in the manufacturer spec page or user manual; eth-100m is inferred from the device class (management PDU of this era). Serial port on the unit is RJ45; the included cable converts to DB9 for RS-232 connectivity. No USB ports. 8 outlets are all front-facing on this MT (transverse/front) variant.

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Captive 12-ft cord with NEMA L5-20P twist-lock plug; nema-5-15 is the closest available connector type — actual plug is NEMA L5-20P (20A locking)

ports.name: AC Out 1
ports.note: NEMA 5-20R receptacle; nema-5-15 is the closest available connector — actual receptacle is NEMA 5-20R (20A)

ports.name: Network
ports.note: 10/100 Ethernet for SNMP/HTTP monitoring via CyberPower Management Console; speed not explicitly stated in public specs — eth-100m inferred from device class

ports.name: Serial
ports.note: RJ45 serial management port on unit; included RJ45-to-DB9 adapter cable in box for connecting to RS-232 equipment
